'''鈭歠-n-v''' ('''kafanav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:youk|youk]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-n-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:youk|youk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-n-v
|-
! Lemma
| kafanav
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifanav|thifanav]] || [[word:jifanav|jifanav]] || [[word:shifanav|shifanav]] || [[word:kifanav|kifanav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufanav|thuthufanav]] || [[word:jujufanav|jujufanav]] || [[word:shushufanav|shushufanav]] || [[word:kukufanav|kukufanav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufanav|thufanav]] || [[word:jufanav|jufanav]] || [[word:shufanav|shufanav]] || [[word:kufanav|kufanav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufanav|thufanav]] || [[word:jufanav|jufanav]] || [[word:shufanav|shufanav]] || [[word:kufanav|kufanav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefanav|thefanav]] || [[word:jefanav|jefanav]] || [[word:shefanav|shefanav]] || [[word:kefanav|kefanav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofanav|thothofanav]] || [[word:jojofanav|jojofanav]] || [[word:shoshofanav|shoshofanav]] || [[word:kokofanav|kokofanav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofanav|thofanav]] || [[word:jofanav|jofanav]] || [[word:shofanav|shofanav]] || [[word:kofanav|kofanav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofanav|thofanav]] || [[word:jofanav|jofanav]] || [[word:shofanav|shofanav]] || [[word:kofanav|kofanav]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fanav|fanav]] || [[word:fanav|fanav]] || [[word:fanav|fanav]] || [[word:fanav|fanav]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fanav|fanav]] || [[word:fanav|fanav]] || [[word:fanav|fanav]] || [[word:fanav|fanav]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fanav|fanav]] || [[word:fanav|fanav]] || [[word:fanav|fanav]] || [[word:fanav|fanav]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fanav|fanav]] || [[word:fanav|fanav]] || [[word:fanav|fanav]] || [[word:fanav|fanav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙fanav|th忙fanav]] || [[word:j忙fanav|j忙fanav]] || [[word:sh忙fanav|sh忙fanav]] || [[word:k忙fanav|k忙fanav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafanav|thathafanav]] || [[word:jajafanav|jajafanav]] || [[word:shashafanav|shashafanav]] || [[word:kakafanav|kakafanav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafanav|thafanav]] || [[word:jafanav|jafanav]] || [[word:shafanav|shafanav]] || [[word:kafanav|kafanav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafanav|thafanav]] || [[word:jafanav|jafanav]] || [[word:shafanav|shafanav]] || [[word:kafanav|kafanav]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafanav|shafanav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafanav|goshafanav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafanav|gokishafanav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafanavn眉|shafanavn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafanavnkn眉|goshafanavnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafanavn眉|gokishafanavn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafanavsh毛|shafanavsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafanavnksh毛|goshafanavnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafanavsh毛|gokishafanavsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafanavro|shafanavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafanavnkro|goshafanavnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafanavro|gokishafanavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafanavmu|shafanavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafanavnkmu|goshafanavnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafanavmu|gokishafanavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafanavsher|shafanavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafanavnksher|goshafanavnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafanavsher|gokishafanavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafanavng|shafanavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafanavnkng|goshafanavnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafanavng|gokishafanavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafanavya|shafanavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafanavnkya|goshafanavnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafanavya|gokishafanavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafanavyam|shafanavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafanavnkyam|goshafanavnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafanavyam|gokishafanavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafanavn眉sh毛|shafanavn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafanavnkn眉sh毛|goshafanavnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafanavn眉sh毛|gokishafanavn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafanavn眉ro|shafanavn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafanavnkn眉ro|goshafanavnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafanavn眉ro|gokishafanavn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafanavn眉mu|shafanavn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafanavnkn眉mu|goshafanavnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafanavn眉mu|gokishafanavn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafanavsh毛n眉|shafanavsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafanavnksh毛n眉|goshafanavnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafanavsh毛n眉|gokishafanavsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafanavsh毛ro|shafanavsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafanavnksh毛ro|goshafanavnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafanavsh毛ro|gokishafanavsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafanavsh毛mu|shafanavsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafanavnksh毛mu|goshafanavnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafanavsh毛mu|gokishafanavsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafanavron眉|shafanavron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafanavnkron眉|goshafanavnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafanavron眉|gokishafanavron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafanavrosh毛|shafanavrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafanavnkrosh毛|goshafanavnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafanavrosh毛|gokishafanavrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafanavromu|shafanavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafanavnkromu|goshafanavnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafanavromu|gokishafanavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafanavmun眉|shafanavmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafanavnkmun眉|goshafanavnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafanavmun眉|gokishafanavmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafanavmush毛|shafanavmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafanavnkmush毛|goshafanavnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafanavmush毛|gokishafanavmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafanavmuro|shafanavmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafanavnkmuro|goshafanavnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafanavmuro|gokishafanavmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
